<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sources/{id}/sync"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Trigger a sync operation for a specific source (admin only)

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"202":{"description":"Accepted","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Sync accepted response","properties":{"source_id":{"example":"src_abc123","type":"string"},"status":{"example":"accepted","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Missing source ID","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
